jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - RINL - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, RINL in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About RINL:
RINL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
